name: Dodge If you Can!
publisher: Pacific Investment and Consulting, Pte. Ltd.
short_description: Dodge If you Can! A simple game where you will either emerge as a Master of strategy, or become a statistic. Will your strategy and wits prevail among the storm of bullets? Will you go down as a legend? Only you can decide. Now - Dodge, If you Can!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Dodge If you Can!

Major Update To Dodge If you Can!


With this Major Update, you will enter a new world of Dodge If you Can!

With brand new features: Including color changes to the Safe Zone and the Projectiles! You will be experiencing challenges unlike anything you have ever faced before!

Within the FIVE ALL-NEW Legendary Levels, you will face High-IQ Turrets, during which you must reach a new designed Safe Zone. However, are you able to defeat such a challenge?

You're interested! You're adventurous! You're motivated to beat this challenge!


About the Game

Dodge If You Can!

A simple game where you will either emerge as a MASTER of strategy, or become a statistic.

Will your strategy and wits prevail among the storm of bullets?

Will you go down as a legend?

Only you can decide. Now - Dodge, If you Can!


For more about the game, visit this channel!
